---
title: "Lecture 9: Control Flow 1"
date: 2025-07-24
summary: "Writing conditionals with if, else, and else if to make decisions"
url_slides: 09-slides.qmd
url_code: csp-materials/if-else
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Date**: {< meta date >}  
**Summary**: {< meta summary >}  
**Slides**: [View Slides]({< meta url_slides >})  
**Code**: Copy and run in your console: `usethis::use_course("{< meta url_code >}")`

## Topics

## Before Class

## Readings
